system.description: Connect big emotions to stray thoughts. Ask any target to interpret something (“What does that cloud look like to you?”, “What do you think this song means?”, “What happens in the third act of that play?” etc.) Listen to their answer and roll [quality].
system.synopsis: Imprint a target's interpretation onto their psyche

outcomes.success:
you may make the target’s answer into the target’s worst fear, greatest goal, or most secret desire (Their worst fear
becomes “a cat eating a palm tree,” their greatest goal becomes “one too many breakups,” their most secret desire becomes “like, a BUNCH of murders,” etc.) This effect lasts until the next time they sleep.
outcomes.triscendence: you may permanently replace any facet of the target’s personality with their answer.
outcomes.failure: they can immediately learn the true answer to the next question they ask you, and they become aware of this fact.

improvement.question: I think being a good friend means...
